mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (open_id, nick_name, avatar_url, phone, wechat_id, is_verified, id_card_front, id_card_back, real_name, id_card_number, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{openId}, #{nickName}, #{avatarUrl}, #{phone}, #{wechatId}, #{isVerified}, #{idCardFront}, #{idCardBack}, #{realName}, #{idCardNumber}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nick_name = #{nickName}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, phone = #{phone}, wechat_id = #{wechatId}, is_verified = #{isVerified}, id_card_front = #{idCardFront}, id_card_back = #{idCardBack}, real_name = #{realName}, id_card_number = #{idCardNumber}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
